items.listing_name: Green Leaf Close-Up I — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A magnificent large-format Cibachrome print capturing a lush green leaf in extreme close-up against a deep black background, the leaf's veins and surface texture rendered in extraordinary botanical detail. The companion piece to "2. Green Leaf 2" — together forming a diptych of large-format botanical photography on Fujifilm stock.

items.listing_name: Clematis Close-Up — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A magnificent large-format Cibachrome print capturing a white clematis flower in extreme close-up against a deep black background. Lush green leaves frame the delicate radiating stamens in extraordinary botanical detail. The Cibachrome process renders the tonal range of white petals with exceptional luminosity.
items.condition: Good — film edge marking visible in border (FUJIFILM RDPM)

items.listing_name: Orange Dahlia Close-Up — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A spectacular large-format Cibachrome print of an orange and peach dahlia captured in extreme close-up, its spiraling layers of petals filling the entire frame. The warm golden tones glow with extraordinary vibrancy on the Cibachrome substrate. A stunning example of large-format botanical photography.
items.condition: Good — FUJIFILM film edge marking in bottom border

items.listing_name: Pink Vanda Orchid on Marbled Background — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A vibrant and exuberant large-format Cibachrome print featuring a spotted pink Vanda orchid in full bloom set against a swirling marbled background of gold, blue, and black. The layered composition combines botanical photography with abstract painting in a bold, maximalist statement.

items.listing_name: Golden Ranunculus on Black — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A radiant large-format Cibachrome print of a golden-orange ranunculus in full bloom, its spiraling layers of petals glowing against a near-black background. The stem grounds the composition with elegant simplicity. The Cibachrome process gives the warm yellows and oranges exceptional luminosity.

items.listing_name: Calla Lilies in Bloom — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A lush, close-up Cibachrome print of calla lilies emerging from deep green foliage against a near-black background. The luminous white blooms are rendered with exceptional tonal depth and detail characteristic of the Cibachrome process. Note: edge damage to right side and top-right corner.
items.condition: Damage: peeling/torn along right edge and top-right corner

items.listing_name: Orange Dahlia with Bee — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A luminous large-format Cibachrome print of an orange dahlia in close-up, a bee visible at its center, set against a soft green bokeh background with another bloom visible at right. Part of the FUJIFILM-bordered flower series alongside "3. Flower" and "2. Green Leaf" — likely the same photographer.

items.listing_name: Strawberries, Peony and Rose Petals — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A rich and sensuous large-format Cibachrome print of a still-life arrangement of strawberries, a white peony, and red rose petals on a dark ornate surface, the composition recalling Dutch Golden Age painting. The Cibachrome process renders the reds with exceptional depth and luminosity. Note: significant surface damage on left and bottom edges.
items.condition: Damage: significant white residue/peeling on left side and bottom edge

items.listing_name: Toco Toucan Close-Up — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A spectacular large-format Cibachrome print of a Toco toucan in extreme close-up, its brilliant orange and red beak dominating the frame against a soft bokeh of tropical foliage. The Cibachrome process renders the vivid color contrasts of the plumage with exceptional saturation and depth.
items.condition: Good — silver film sprocket holes on top and bottom borders

items.listing_name: Blue-and-Yellow Macaw Close-Up — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A vivid large-format Cibachrome print of a blue-and-yellow macaw in dramatic close-up, its brilliant cobalt and gold plumage rendered against a soft green bokeh. The companion piece to "4. Toucan" — same sprocket border style, same photographer, same tropical bird subject matter.
items.condition: Good — silver sprocket holes on sides

items.listing_name: Black Rooster on Purple — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A commanding large-format Cibachrome studio portrait of a large black rooster standing against a vivid purple background, its iridescent plumage catching the light in deep teals and blues. The formal studio treatment elevates the bird to a regal subject. Bold, graphic, and highly collectible.

items.listing_name: African Elephant Family — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A warm and intimate large-format Cibachrome print of three African elephants — two adults and a calf — walking together across dry savanna grassland. The rich golden tones of the grass and the gentle interplay between the animals give the image a tender, familial quality. The Cibachrome process renders the elephants' textured skin with exceptional depth and warmth.

items.listing_name: Red Hearts in Glass Bowl with Mesh — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of red heart shapes in a glass bowl draped with dark mesh fabric, rendered with rich tonal contrast. The third piece in the hearts/mesh series alongside "36. Heart Screen" and "40. Hearts in Wire," forming a cohesive triptych of still-life works.

items.listing_name: Red Hearts in Copper Wire Mesh — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of red heart shapes nestled in glittering copper wire mesh, casting dramatic shadows on a pale textured surface. Part of a series with "36. Heart Screen" and "37. Hearts Bowl" — three works exploring hearts, mesh, and shadow by the same artist.

items.listing_name: Chalk Body Outline with Figure — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format B&W print depicting a chalk body outline on a dark asphalt surface, viewed from above, with a crouching figure at the top of the frame. The aerial perspective and stark contrast create a powerful, cinematic image. Part of a series — companion to "25. Chalk." Film sprocket holes visible in borders.
items.condition: Good — film sprocket holes visible on top and bottom borders

items.listing_name: Chalk Body Outline, Street Scene — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A striking and provocative large-format print depicting a chalk body outline on a dark street, with a crouching figure nearby. Rendered in stark black and white with deep contrast, the image carries a cinematic, noir quality. Note: may be silver gelatin or B&W Cibachrome rather than color process.
items.condition: Good — appears to be B&W print, not typical color Cibachrome

items.listing_name: Chalk Body Outline in Red — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format color Cibachrome print depicting a chalk body outline on dark asphalt, filled with vivid red toning and viewed from above with a crouching figure at the top. Unlike its B&W companions in the series, the red Cibachrome coloring transforms the image into something rawer and more visceral.

items.listing_name: Chalk Body Outline in Red II — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format color Cibachrome print — companion to "34. Chalk Hearts" — depicting a chalk body outline filled with vivid red toning on dark asphalt, viewed from above with a crouching figure. The white paper border distinguishes it from the black-bordered version. Part of the chalk/body outline series alongside prints 5, 25, and 34.

items.listing_name: Twin Towers at Night, New York — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A moody and historically significant Cibachrome print depicting the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center illuminated against a night sky, viewed across the water from New Jersey. A lone figure stands in the warm orange foreground light. A powerful document of pre-9/11 New York.

items.listing_name: Manhattan Skyline with Twin Towers at Night — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A luminous large-format Cibachrome print capturing the Lower Manhattan skyline at night across the water, dominated by the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center. The deep blue tones and glittering city lights create an ethereal atmosphere. A historically significant pre-9/11 document.

items.listing_name: Twin Towers, New York — Portrait Cibachrome Print
items.description: A dramatic large-format Cibachrome print of the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center photographed in portrait format, the towers rising boldly against a deep blue sky with dramatic clouds. A historically significant pre-9/11 document rendered with striking clarity.

items.listing_name: Twin Towers at Dusk, New York — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center rising dramatically against a richly clouded sky at dusk, the lower Manhattan skyline silhouetted below. A slightly different framing from the other Twin Towers prints in this collection — more atmospheric sky, warmer tones.

items.listing_name: Statue of Liberty at Dusk — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A serene large-format Cibachrome print of the Statue of Liberty photographed at dusk from the water, the warm light of the setting sun illuminating the statue against a lavender and rose sky. The calm harbor water mirrors the fading light in tones of violet and silver. A timeless image of one of New York's most iconic landmarks.

items.listing_name: Manhattan Skyline with Twin Towers — Signed, Camilo José Vergara
items.description: A significant large-format Cibachrome print of the Lower Manhattan skyline with the Twin Towers, signed in ink on the print by Camilo José Vergara — a celebrated documentary photographer whose work is held in the collections of MoMA, the Library of Congress, and the Smithsonian. Vergara is known for his decades-long documentation of American urban landscapes. A signed print by a collected living photographer represents substantially higher value than an unsigned work. ⚠️ Recommend researching current market value for signed Vergara prints before pricing.

items.listing_name: Man Standing in Forest Fire — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A dramatic large-format Cibachrome print of a man standing amid a forest fire, silhouetted against misty trees with flames visible at ground level. The ethereal blue-white mist contrasts with the warm orange fire below, creating a powerful and otherworldly atmosphere.

items.listing_name: Cat and Sheep, Night Scene — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A mysterious and dramatically lit large-format Cibachrome print depicting a ginger cat facing a sheep whose head is being held by a human hand in the dark — a scene of rural life or slaughter rendered with cinematic intensity. The deep blacks and warm amber highlights of the Cibachrome process give the image a Caravaggio-like chiaroscuro quality.

items.listing_name: Stray Dog on Dirt Road — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A quietly powerful large-format Cibachrome print of a lean, dark-coated dog standing alone on a dusty dirt road, staring directly into the camera. The wide open landscape and low-angle perspective give the animal a dignified, almost human presence. Warm late-afternoon light suffuses the scene.

items.listing_name: Gaucho Aiming at Cattle II — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A companion piece to "31. Ranch," this large-format Cibachrome print shows the same gaucho scene from a slightly different angle — a man in a wide-brimmed hat raising a pistol toward cattle along a fenced pasture. The cooler sky tones distinguish this version from its companion, together forming a diptych.

items.listing_name: Gaucho Dragging Horse on Dirt Road — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A compelling square-format Cibachrome print of a gaucho in a wide-brimmed hat dragging a resistant horse along a dusty dirt road under a wide open sky. The warm late-afternoon light and vast flat landscape evoke the Argentine pampas. Note: light streaking in upper sky area.
items.condition: Light streaking/fading visible in upper center of image

items.listing_name: Gaucho Aiming at Cattle — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A tense and cinematic large-format Cibachrome print of a gaucho in a wide-brimmed hat raising a pistol toward a group of cattle along a fenced pasture under a wide open sky. The understated composition and vast flat landscape evoke the Argentine pampas with quiet drama.

items.listing_name: Lone Pine Tree by Scottish Loch — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A sweeping large-format Cibachrome print of a windswept Scots pine on the rocky shore of a Scottish loch, mountains fading into a hazy blue distance. The wide landscape format captures the raw, elemental beauty of the Scottish Highlands with exceptional tonal depth.
items.condition: Good — red film sprocket holes visible on top and bottom borders

items.listing_name: Milan Cathedral (Duomo), Piazza del Duomo — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A sweeping large-format Cibachrome print of the façade of the Milan Cathedral (Duomo di Milano) across a bustling Piazza del Duomo, pigeons and tourists filling the square under a pale sky. The red sprocket borders place this firmly in the Ireland/Europe travel series by the same photographer.
items.condition: Good — red film sprocket holes on top and bottom borders

items.listing_name: Irish Castle with Horse and Cart — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of a medieval Irish castle tower with a horse and covered cart in the foreground on lush green grass beneath a brooding grey sky. The red-bordered film sprocket marks suggest the same photographer as the Tree and Stone House prints in this collection.
items.condition: Good — red film sprocket holes on all borders

items.listing_name: Thatched Cottage, Connemara — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A luminous large-format Cibachrome print of a whitewashed thatched cottage set in the rocky Connemara landscape of western Ireland, a path leading to the gate under a bright blue sky with white clouds. The red sprocket borders link this to the Tree and Castle prints — likely the same photographer and journey.
items.condition: Good — red film sprocket holes on top and bottom borders

items.listing_name: Harbour of Nice, Côte d'Azur — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A vibrant large-format Cibachrome print of the Vieux-Port of Nice on the French Riviera, the foreground filled with colorful traditional fishing boats — painted in blue, yellow, and teal — against the turquoise harbor water and the ochre buildings of the old town climbing the hill behind. The Cibachrome process captures the saturated Mediterranean palette with extraordinary fidelity.

items.listing_name: Illuminated Green House at Dusk — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A striking large-format Cibachrome print depicting an abandoned farmhouse bathed in vivid green light against a dramatic twilight sky of deep violet and rose. The contrast between the electric green structure and the natural sunset palette creates a surreal, painterly atmosphere. A rare and museum-quality piece.

items.listing_name: Water Lilies and Lotus Pond — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A magnificent large-format Cibachrome print capturing a lush pond blanketed in lily pads and blooming water lilies in red, white, and pink. The deep reflective water creates a Monet-like composition of extraordinary color and depth. Minor surface mark in lower-left area.

items.listing_name: Portland Head Lighthouse — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A classic large-format Cibachrome print of the iconic Portland Head Lighthouse in Maine, rendered in rich, saturated color. The white tower rises above a red-roofed keeper's house perched on dramatic rocky coastline under a sweeping cloudy sky. A timeless piece of American seascape photography.

items.listing_name: Dog Sled Team, Alaska — Panoramic Cibachrome Print
items.description: A spectacular panoramic large-format Cibachrome print of a dog sled team racing across a snow-covered Alaskan landscape, spruce trees and snow-capped mountains stretching across the deep blue horizon. Shot on Fujifilm Velvia (RVP), the colors are extraordinarily vivid. A companion panoramic to "12. New York Harbor."
items.condition: Good — FUJI RVP (Velvia) film markings and frame numbers visible in borders

items.listing_name: West Quoddy Head Lighthouse, Maine — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of the distinctive red-and-white striped West Quoddy Head Lighthouse in Maine — the easternmost point in the United States — under a blue sky with light cloud. The bold graphic stripes and saturated colors are perfectly suited to the Cibachrome process.

items.listing_name: African Children with Balloons — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A joyful and vibrant large-format Cibachrome print of four African children seated against a mud brick wall, each holding brightly colored balloons — red, green, orange — that pop against the warm earth tones. A warmly observed document of childhood exuberance, likely photographed in West Africa.
items.condition: Good — silver film sprocket holes on bottom border

items.listing_name: Mursi Woman with Lip Plate and Child, Ethiopia — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A striking large-format Cibachrome print of a Mursi or Suri woman wearing a traditional clay lip plate, holding a young child against a background of dry brush and rocky terrain in southern Ethiopia. An important document of indigenous culture captured with warmth and directness.

items.listing_name: Hindu Sadhu at Temple, Nepal — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A vivid and immersive large-format Cibachrome print depicting a Hindu sadhu in saffron robes seated before a richly carved red brick temple, raising his hand in greeting or blessing. The saturated reds and golds of the image are rendered with exceptional depth by the Cibachrome process. Likely photographed in Kathmandu, Nepal.

items.listing_name: Chinese Boy in Red Cap — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A charming and warmly observed large-format Cibachrome print of a young Chinese boy in a red-and-white striped cap and blue padded jacket, hand raised to his mouth, looking directly at the camera with a shy smile. The portrait captures an intimate moment of childhood with exceptional warmth and color fidelity.
items.condition: Good — red/purple sprocket holes on side borders

items.listing_name: Blue Classic Car, Havana Street Scene — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A vivid large-format Cibachrome print of a blue American classic car — a 1950s Chevrolet — parked on a Havana street, its chrome bumper and headlight filling the foreground against the crumbling colonial architecture of old Havana. The yellow Cuban license plate reads HEX696. The Cibachrome process renders the electric blue paintwork and warm street light with exceptional saturation.

items.listing_name: Keith Haring in His Studio — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of a man seated among dozens of colorful jars of paint or pigment, flanked by large geometric color-field paintings in red, blue, and orange on a yellow ground. The subject and setting strongly suggest this may be a portrait of Keith Haring in his studio, circa mid-1980s. Surface scratching visible in upper portion of print. ⚠️ If confirmed as Keith Haring, the Haring Foundation is active and this image may have significant value — recommend research before pricing.

items.listing_name: Andy Warhol & Jean-Michel Basquiat — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print depicting Andy Warhol and Jean-Michel Basquiat standing in front of one of their collaborative paintings, circa 1985 — likely photographed around their joint exhibition at the Tony Shafrazi Gallery, New York. The image is almost certainly by photographer Michael Halsband, who documented their collaboration extensively. Both the Warhol and Basquiat estates are active — this print should be researched carefully before listing publicly. Sold as a physical print only. ⚠️ High-value subject — recommend research before pricing.

items.listing_name: Andy Warhol & Jean-Michel Basquiat II — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A companion print to No. 63 — a slightly different crop of the same Andy Warhol and Jean-Michel Basquiat session, circa 1985, showing more of the collaborative painting behind them. Surface scratching visible in the upper portion of the emulsion. Both the Warhol and Basquiat estates are active — recommend research before listing. ⚠️ High-value subject.

items.listing_name: The Beatles — Portrait Grid, Shahrokh Hatami
items.description: A large-format B&W photographic print featuring the four Beatles in a 2×2 grid of dramatic close-up portrait photographs, by Iranian photographer Shahrokh Hatami — known for his rare and intimate access to the Beatles at the Cavern Club in Liverpool in 1963, shooting for Paris Match. Hatami (1928–2017) was one of the preeminent photojournalists of the 20th century.

items.listing_name: The Beatles — Double Portrait Grid, Shahrokh Hatami
items.description: A large-format B&W photographic print featuring the four Beatles in a 2×4 double-grid of dramatic close-up portrait photographs, by Iranian photographer Shahrokh Hatami — known for his rare and intimate access to the Beatles at the Cavern Club in Liverpool in 1963, shooting for Paris Match. The double-grid format is a larger companion to the single-grid print. Hatami (1928–2017) was one of the preeminent photojournalists of the 20th century.
items.condition: Note: B&W on white paper, not typical Cibachrome

items.listing_name: The Beatles Backstage — Signed Color Print, Shahrokh Hatami
items.description: A rare color photographic print depicting all four Beatles in a backstage dressing room, circa 1963–64, by Iranian photographer Shahrokh Hatami — known for his rare color photographs of the Beatles at the Cavern Club for Paris Match. The print carries a handwritten signature, believed to be Hatami's own. Hatami (1928–2017) was one of the preeminent photojournalists of the 20th century whose work has sold at auction up to $3,000. Note: minor water damage on reverse, not visible from front. A signed Hatami Beatles print is among the most significant items in this collection.

items.listing_name: Reclining Nude in Warm Light — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A richly lit large-format Cibachrome print depicting a reclining female nude bathed in warm amber and red tones against an ornate background. The cinematic lighting and color palette evoke old master painting traditions rendered through fine art photography. Note: significant emulsion damage at bottom-right corner.
items.condition: Significant damage: large area of torn/peeling emulsion at bottom-right corner

items.listing_name: Reclining Nude in Amber Light — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A large-format Cibachrome print of a reclining female nude in warm amber and red tones, part of the same series as "46. Naked Lady" and "47. Naked Lady." The cinematic lighting and richly colored background create a painterly, old-master quality. Note: damage at bottom center and bottom-right.
items.condition: Damage: torn/peeling material at bottom center and bottom-right

items.listing_name: Standing Nude in Doorway — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A striking large-format Cibachrome print of a standing female nude in bright sunlight, arms raised behind her head, set against a weathered wooden door and rough stone wall. Shot on medium format 120 film (Fujifilm RDPII), the image has a raw, direct quality that contrasts with the other nude studies in the collection.
items.condition: Good — shot on 120 medium format film (RDPII marking visible); image cropped within black border

items.listing_name: Lichen-Covered Brick Wall — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A richly textured large-format Cibachrome print of an aged brick wall encrusted with lichen and mineral deposits in deep golds, blues, and russets. The abstract, almost painterly composition rewards close inspection. The Cibachrome process gives exceptional depth to the complex surface detail.

items.listing_name: Fried Egg on a Line — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A witty and oversized large-format Cibachrome print depicting a fried egg suspended by clothespins on a washing line, set against a soft grey-blue background. Surrealist in spirit, the image is bold, graphic, and highly collectible. Note: minor damage at bottom-right corner.
items.condition: Damage: white residue/peeling at bottom-right corner

items.listing_name: Abstract Color Blocks — Large Cibachrome Print
items.description: A bold and graphic large-format Cibachrome print of overlapping colored gels or panels — blue, yellow, red, and green — creating a kinetic abstract composition against a black background. The saturated primaries glow with exceptional intensity on the Cibachrome substrate. A striking piece of abstract color photography.

items.listing_name: Fried Egg on a Line II — Cibachrome Print
items.description: A companion piece to "9. Egg," this large-format Cibachrome print shows a fried egg suspended by two clothespins on a washing line against a soft grey-blue background. The egg appears more weathered and torn than its companion, adding a darkly comic dimension to the surrealist still-life series.

items.listing_name: Piggy Clock Figurine II — Minimalist Cibachrome Print
items.description: A companion piece to "44. Piggy Clock," this large-format Cibachrome print features the same pink pig clock figurine set against a vast white background in a deadpan minimalist composition. The two prints together form a diptych exploring scale, isolation, and the absurdity of objects. Note: edge damage on right side.
items.condition: Damage: white residue/peeling on right edge — registration holes in top border

items.listing_name: Piggy Clock Figurine — Minimalist Cibachrome Print
items.description: A witty and understated large-format Cibachrome print featuring a small pink pig clock figurine centered in vast white negative space. The deliberate minimalism — a tiny object in a sea of white — creates a deadpan, conceptual quality reminiscent of product photography elevated to fine art.
items.condition: Good — registration punch holes in top border
